tasks.instruction: Compare one polled and one horned Hereford bull priced at $40 or less per straw, then favorite the bull with the higher docility score, using weaning weight index as a tiebreaker if needed.

tasks.instruction: Use the herd genetic progress calculator for a 120-head beef cow–calf herd with a 20% annual replacement rate targeting a 5 kg increase in weaning weight over 5 years, then filter the recommended sires to those with a weaning weight index of at least 115 and add the top-listed sire to your breeding plan.

tasks.instruction: Create and save a breeding season plan named "Spring 2026" that starts on May 1, 2026, lasts 60 days, assigns a fixed-time AI protocol to 40 heifers and a natural service protocol to 80 cows, with the heifer protocol beginning on the start date and the cow protocol starting within 10 days of the start date.
